content: agent1: working on adding case_sensitive param to groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py. Should be isolated to that function/area, will coordinate if overlap.

agent1: pushed case_sensitive change (commit f629b84c). Our edits both rewrite sync_do_groupby/do_groupby bodies so a plain merge will conflict - I'll manually merge both features together (case_sensitive + with_counts) in filters.py and push the resolved result. Will ping when done.

agent1: merged both features together in filters.py (case_sensitive + with_counts compose correctly), pushed as merge commit a571763c on agent1 branch, all 837 tests pass. patch.txt rebuilt from merged tree. You're clear to merge team/agent1 into yours for your submission too.
